title: What is FluWatchers? - Canada.ca
content:
## What is FluWatchers?
Download in PDF format (125 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Public Health Agency of Canada
Published: 2023-10-31
FluWatchers is an online health monitoring platform that  helps track the spread of flu and flu-like illness (like COVID-19) across  Canada.

## Why is FluWatchers important?
- Traditional  ways of tracking diseases require a person to see a health care practitioner  and get tested
- However,  most people with mild flu-like symptoms don’t seek any medical care
- The FluWatchers program captures  information on these individuals to get a better sense of flu-like illness in  the community

## Who can participate?
- Anyone  who lives in Canada can participate, and participants can also report on  behalf of household members

## What do FluWatchers do?
- Volunteers answer a quick and anonymous  questionnaire each week on whether they’ve had a cough or fever or were healthy

## What data traditional disease tracking provides

## What data FluWatchers can provide
- Undiagnosed  illness
